title: Pillarger
description: Makes logs and pillar blocks connect to eachother in 2x2 patterns.
body:
Makes all logs, stripped logs and pillar blocks connect to eachother in 2x2 patterns.

Simply place the blocks and they will connect automatically unless sneaking.

This also works with the world gen, allowing large trees to have connected logs.
